description: Configure Tor Browser for accessing multimedia digital archives securely. Set the global default for autoplay to block all audio and video, then explicitly allow media autoplay for both https://commons.wikimedia.org/ and https://archive.org/. Create a bookmark folder named 'Trusted Archives' containing bookmarks for 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/' titled 'Wikimedia Commons' and 'https://archive.org/' titled 'Internet Archive'.
